items.scenario: You signed up for a weekend pottery workshop at a community arts studio, choosing the beginner glazing track. The confirmation you received lists the advanced wheel-throwing class instead, which meets on a different evening you cannot attend.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Brennan. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the mix-up between the class you chose and the one listed
Ask whether you can be moved into the beginner glazing track
Explain which evenings actually work for your schedule
items.subject: Wrong pottery track on my workshop confirmation

items.scenario: You are a second-year student who missed last week's chemistry lab because you were sick with the flu. The syllabus says missed labs cannot be made up, but you have a doctor's note and hope an exception is possible.
items.direction: Write an email to Dr. Fairbanks. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you were absent from the lab session
Ask whether a make-up lab can be arranged this time
Describe the documentation you can provide to support this
items.subject: Missed chemistry lab and a possible make-up

items.scenario: You rent a studio apartment, and for the past week the water pressure in your shower has dropped to a trickle every evening. A neighbor on your floor mentioned the same problem, so it seems to affect the whole building.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Sandoval. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the water-pressure problem you keep having at night
Tell him that a neighbor is experiencing the same issue
Ask when a plumber can come to inspect the building
items.subject: Low evening water pressure across the building

items.scenario: You volunteer at a neighborhood food pantry, and a new online shift-booking system was introduced last month. Many regular volunteers, including you, find it hard to use and have started missing their slots by accident.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Donnelly. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the trouble volunteers are having with the new system
Describe a recent shift that was missed because of it
Suggest a change that would make booking easier
items.subject: Feedback on the new volunteer shift system
